United States.specialStudentRules: F-1 non-residents are exempt from FICA (Social Security & Medicare) taxes for their first 5 years.

United Kingdom.specialStudentRules: Full-time students do not pay National Insurance if earnings are below primary threshold.

Canada.specialStudentRules: Tuition tax credits can be used to offset future income taxes.

Germany.specialStudentRules: Mini-jobs (up to €538/month) are entirely tax-free and exempt from social security contributions.

Australia.specialStudentRules: Temporary residents may have different tax-free thresholds.
